mechanics.excerpt: Poor Vision rated at 6 points represents blindness, making impossible for the character to make ranged attacks against targets fartner than Short Range and applying Ine Terrible Visibility Modifier (+51 to all sight-based TNs (including attacks) regardless of the actual lighting conditions Because blind char- acters rely on their hearing they also have the Poor Hearing Trait ; iney must apply the Poor Hearing modifiers ranged attack rolls.
